overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a foggy 19th-century harbor dock at golden hour. The character moves from a covered wooden walkway past NPCs including a police officer, transitioning to an open waterfront with sailing ships visible through the atmospheric mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered dock walkway with cargo storage

events.description: passes close by police officer who temporarily fills the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered dock area, passing workers and cargo bales under the wooden canopy

notable_agents.action: police officer in blue uniform standing with arms crossed, observing the dock area
seated worker resting against a wooden support post

entered.detail: wooden roof structure with exposed beams extending over the walkway
thick wooden posts supporting the dock roof
white-wrapped rectangular bales stacked along the dock edge
large wooden industrial building with multiple stories
dark metal drum sitting on the wooden planks

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a covered wooden dock walkway with thick support pillars and a roof overhead. The character walks forward through moderate crowds of dock workers, passing close to a police officer in a distinctive blue uniform standing with arms crossed. Stacked cargo bales line the right side while wooden warehouse buildings are visible through the support structure on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock platform with seating areas

events.description: exits covered dock canopy into open waterfront area with direct sky visibility
golden hour sunlight becomes directly visible as fog diffuses the warm light

agents.ego_description: continuing through the open dock area past wooden tables and chairs, moving toward the water

notable_agents.action: dock worker in overalls walking away from the camera toward the warehouse

entered.detail: rustic wooden dining tables arranged on the dock platform
simple wooden chairs paired with the tables
tall wooden telegraph poles with crossbars
clear view of the sky and distant buildings now visible after exiting the covered area

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into an open dock area bathed in golden hour light. Wooden tables and chairs are arranged on the left side of the platform. The sky becomes fully visible with warm sunlight diffusing through the atmospheric haze. Utility poles and distant wooden warehouse buildings line the horizon as the character continues walking toward the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with moored sailing ships

events.description: sailing ships become visible through the fog as camera approaches the water's edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the foggy waterfront, approaching the moored sailing ships with long shadows cast on the planks

notable_agents.action: dock worker leaning against cargo near the water's edge

entered.detail: large wooden sailing vessel with tall masts moored at the dock, partially obscured by fog
calm harbor water reflecting the golden light
thick mist rolling in from the water, obscuring distant details
the edge of the wooden pier with posts extending into the water

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the open waterfront where the fog thickens considerably. Large sailing ships with tall masts emerge from the mist, moored alongside the wooden dock. The golden sunlight creates a hazy glow over the water surface. The character walks along the dock edge, passing a worker leaning against cargo, as the wooden warehouse buildings fade into the fog behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy harbor edge with large moored vessels and decorative pier structures

events.description: decorative flags and bunting become visible strung across the ornate pier pavilion

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dock edge past large sailing ships shrouded in dense fog, approaching the ornate pier structure

entered.detail: prominent three-masted sailing ship docked at the pier with detailed rigging
decorative wooden pavilion with intricate roof details and hanging lanterns
string of triangular flags suspended between poles across the dock
festive pennant banners strung above the walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deeper into the foggy harbor where large sailing ships dominate the right side of the frame. An ornate wooden pavilion with decorative bunting and flags appears on the left, suggesting a more developed pier area. The fog creates a mysterious atmosphere as the character continues along the weathered wooden planks, with the masts of ships fading into the white mist ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered industrial walkway into an expansive, fog-shrouded harbor at golden hour. It begins under a covered wooden dock walkway, moving past thick support pillars and crowds of workers, including a police officer in a blue uniform, while cargo bales line the path. As the character emerges from the shelter, the scene opens into a sunlit dock area where wooden tables and chairs appear under a warm, hazy sky. The camera then transitions toward the open waterfront, where the golden light diffuses through thickening mist as large sailing ships with tall masts gradually materialize from the fog. Finally, the movement leads deeper into the harbor past an ornate wooden pavilion with decorative bunting, with the weathered planks of the pier stretching forward as the distant masts fade into a dense white haze.
